seoDescription: Access the Aivora developer workspace, showing autonomous agent operations, real-time syncs, and telemetry logs.
keywords: AI terminal, developer workspace, AI metrics, developer portal
headline: Aivora Intelligence
supportingText: This environment demonstrates how Aivora engineers build and orchestrate AI-powered systems using deterministic pipelines.
title: Aivora Intelligence
welcomeMessage:
Welcome to Aivora! I am your AI Business Assistant. How can I help you today?

I can assist you with:
1. Exploring our technical services and automations.
2. Estimating your project budget.
3. Submitting your request directly to our team.

step3.desc: Email ticket is securely dispatched to aivoraaa@outlook.com via Gmail SMTP.
